overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The character travels from an elevated highway underpass through city streets and narrow alleys, passing neon signs, pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles in a dense urban environment with warm, hazy atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with dedicated green bike lane

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green painted bike lane beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction along the path

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support columns
rusted metal barrier separating pedestrian path from building edge
painted green asphalt surface marking the pedestrian and bike pathway
tall cyberpunk building with reflective glass facade and neon signage
large illuminated advertisement screen with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a green painted bike lane beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The space is semi-covered with metal railings on the left and futuristic glass towers visible on the right. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction while vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with steam vents and digital billboards

events.description: exits the covered underpass into open sunlight at the intersection crosswalk
crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide intersection crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing marked with thick yellow parallel lines
ground-level vent emitting white steam onto the street surface
large digital news display showing WNS logo on building facade
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into bright sunlight at a wide urban intersection. They cross the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while a futuristic sedan waits at the traffic light. Steam rises from a street vent near a large WNS digital news screen on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with corrugated metal shacks and debris

events.description: turns right off the main street into a narrow alleyway with trash and corrugated metal structures
climbs over an orange safety railing and descends concrete stairs to a lower level

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow back alley, climbing over obstacles to reach a lower street level

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench eating food near the alley entrance

entered.detail: small makeshift structure with rusted corrugated metal walls and green trim
cluster of blue and black garbage bags piled against the wall
descending staircase leading down to the lower commercial level
painted metal guardrail along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow back alley filled with trash bags and corrugated metal shacks. After passing a person sitting on a bench, they climb over an orange safety railing and descend concrete stairs toward a lower level, leaving the main street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and distant mega-towers

events.description: exits the narrow alley onto a wider commercial street with neon signs and open city views
teal futuristic sports car drives past the character on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial street observing neon signs and the distant mega-tower skyline

notable_agents.action: teal futuristic sports car driving along the street past the character

entered.detail: vertical neon sign with Japanese characters and blue HO text
weathered concrete seating along the sidewalk with people resting
futuristic food vending unit with illuminated BURRITO signage
massive futuristic skyscrapers visible through the haze in the distance
elevated monorail or transit track crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley onto a bustling commercial street lined with neon signs including a prominent hotel sign. Concrete benches line the walkway while a burrito vending machine stands on the right. The street offers a clear view of distant mega-towers through the haze, and a teal sports car drives past as the character continues exploring the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered shadows of a highway underpass into the bright, neon-lit density of a futuristic commercial district. It begins with the character walking along a green bike lane beneath a massive concrete overpass, flanked by metal railings and towering glass skyscrapers. As the character emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a sun-drenched urban intersection where they cross a yellow-striped street past rising steam and a large digital news screen. The camera then shifts away from the main road, following the character into a narrow, cluttered alleyway filled with corrugated shacks before descending a set of concrete stairs. Finally, the path opens up onto a bustling commercial street lined with glowing neon hotel signs and vending machines, offering a hazy view of distant mega-towers as a teal sports car speeds past.
